_publications._publicationTitle: The haploinsufficient hematopoietic microenvironment is critical to the pathological fracture repair in murine models of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: pDEXA scans on 4–6-month-old mice revealed a 22% reduction of whole body BMD in PeriCre mice as compared to the other 3 genotypes
details: Successfully measured whole body BMD showing 22% reduction in PeriCre mice compared to other genotypes
